scripts.build:frontend: npm run prepare:frontend-assets && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json && npx tailwindcss -i public/input.css -o public/output.css
scripts.test:frontend:js-smoke: npm run build:frontend && FRONTEND_MODULES_DIR=public/js node --experimental-default-type=module --test test/frontend-api-contract.test.mjs test/frontend-dashboard-contract.test.mjs test/frontend-history-stream.test.mjs test/frontend-overview-activity-stream.test.mjs test/frontend-publisher-health-contract.test.mjs test/frontend-status-stream.test.mjs test/frontend-build-smoke.test.mjs
scripts.bench:frontend-dom: npm run build:frontend && FRONTEND_JS_DIR=public/js node test/frontend-dom-render-bench.mjs
